metadata.description: Community-contributed AI skills for useful New Zealand-specific data and workflows.

plugins.name: nz-skills
plugins.description: 48 read-only NZ data connectors — LINZ, Stats NZ, RBNZ, GeoNet, MetService, Auckland Transport, Metlink, fuel prices, electricity market, supermarkets and retail pricing, Companies/NZBN registers, DOC huts, tides/surf, news, and more.
